title: microlepia khasiyana
intro: Microlepia khasiyana, also known as the Indian Rui or Rui, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Microlepia khasiyana include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve digestion. Microlepia khasiyana can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
